NAME: BK-166: POST /api/v1/auth/signin with valid credentials returns user+session+PAT
BK-166: POST /api/v1/auth/signin with non-existent email returns 401
BK-166: POST /api/v1/auth/check-email returns exists+confirmed for existing user
BK-166: POST /api/v1/auth/signin with wrong password returns 401
BK-166: POST /api/v1/auth/check-email returns exists=false for unknown email
BK-166: GET /api/v1/me returns user info with valid PAT token
BK-166: signin PAT can be used to authenticate subsequent API calls
